core_mechanism: exhaustive combinatorial enumeration over the Cartesian product of discrete admissible choice points, producing an ensemble/distribution of outcomes that is then collapsed by a summary functional (e.g. a worst-case/minimax aggregator over the ensemble)
brief_reason: The abstract centers on 'multiverse analysis', whose machinery is generating the full set of specifications from combined analytic choices, and its proposed reform — 'evaluating multiverses by the single worst universe they contain' — is a worst-case aggregation over that combinatorial ensemble.
